+ Encrypt(s[..|s|-1])\n    14→}\n    15→\n    16→// s is a valid decryption of ciphertext t iff encrypting s produces t\n    17→ghost predicate IsDecryptionOf(s: string, t: string)\n    18→{\n    19→ n && u2 >= 0\n    35→  {\n    36→    s := s + [t[u1]];\n    37→    s := s + [t[u2]];\n    38→    u1 := u1 + 1;\n    39→    u2 := u2 - 1;\n    40→  }\n    41→  if n % 2 == 0 {\n    42→    s := s + [t[n The Right-Left encryption: builds a string by writing s[0], then alternately\n// appending (odd indices) and prepending (even indices >= 2) each subsequent character.\nghost function Encrypt(s: string): string\n  decreases |s|\n{\n  if |s| == 0 then \"\"\n  else if |s| == 1 then [s[0]]\n  else if |s| % 2 == 0 then\n    // Last character index is odd → append to the right\n    Encrypt(s[..|s|-1]) + [s[|s|-1]]\n  else\n    // Last character index is even (>=2) → prepend to the left\n    [s[|s|-1]] + Encrypt(s[..|s|-1])\n}\n\n// s is a valid decryption of ciphertext t iff encrypting s produces t\nghost predicate IsDecryptionOf(s: string, t: string)\n{\n  |s| == |t| && Encrypt(s) == t\n}\n\nmethod Decrypt(t: string) returns (s: string)\n  ensures IsDecryptionOf(s, t)\n{\n  var n := |t|;\n  if n == 0 {\n    s := \"\";\n    return;\n  }\n  var mid := (n - 1) / 2;\n  s := [t[mid]];\n  var u1: int := mid + 1;\n  var u2: int := mid - 1;\n  while u1 < n && u2 >= 0\n  {\n    s := s + [t[u1]];\n    s := s + [t[u2]];\n    u1 := u1 + 1;\n    u2 := u2 - 1;\n  }\n  if n % 2 == 0 {\n    s := s + [t[n - 1]];\n  }\n}","numLines":44,"startLine":1,"totalLines":44}}},{"type":"assistant","message":{"id":"6f0ecc17-a565-4fd9-b94b-118c77bbf08d","container":null,"model":"<synthetic>","role":"assistant","stop_reason":"stop_sequence","stop_sequence":"","type":"message","usage":{"input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":0,"cache_creation_input_tokens":0,"cache_read_input_tokens":0,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":null,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":null,"iterations":null,"speed":null},"content":[{"type":"text","text":"API
